1. Introduction

This document establishes the terms of the agreement between the parties. It is binding upon execution by both signatories.

1.1 Background

The parties have engaged in prior discussions regarding the subject matter described herein. Those discussions are superseded by this document.

1.2 Scope

The scope is limited to the activities described in Section 2.

2. Definitions

The following terms have the meanings ascribed below.

2.1 "Party" means a signatory to this agreement.
